cases.title: Single table scope - prefix matches no scope columns, only functions

expected.comment: Scope=[orders]. Single table. CURRENT_TABLE=products not in scope (ignored). Prefix 'p' matches only out-of-scope tables, so show table hints.

cases.title: Single table scope - prefix matches BOTH column name AND table name

expected.comment: Scope=[products]. Single table. CURRENT_TABLE=orders not in scope (ignored). Prefix 'p' returns unqualified match first, then qualified match, then remaining qualified columns in schema order.

cases.title: Single table scope - prefix matches ONLY column name (not table name)

expected.comment: Scope=[orders]. Single table. CURRENT_TABLE=items not in scope (ignored). Prefix 'u' matches only unqualified column 'user_id', then matching functions.
